sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5964" key="a)mfi/noos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφί-νοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">looking at both sides,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Δημόκριτος</foreign> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg002.perseus-grc1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
